path: Assets/Thirds/NodeEditor/NpcEventEditor/Saves/Jsons/奇遇任务/新手岛奇遇/NpcEventGraph_211000253_新手岛奇遇_求购灵果.json

data.ConfigJson: {"ID":211001176,"TalkGroupID":211001110,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"DialogOptionID":[211000759,211000766],"TalkDescEditor":"小友，考虑得如何？只需要一枚金灵果，便可换得3000灵石。成败皆在一念之间。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001177,"TalkGroupID":211001113,"NpcIndex":-1,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"噢？白道友，此前我怎生从未听闻五行界中有如此怪病，竟需灵果救治……","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001180,"TalkGroupID":211001113,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"白某本无心诓你，奈何这灵果采买是风云变幻，兵贵神速哟。如今白某原以5000灵石重金收购一枚金灵果，已比许多商贩要来得慷慨了，还劝小友莫要错失良机啊……","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001178,"TalkGroupID":211001113,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"嘿嘿……小友，此病人人皆有。道友若有囊中羞涩，胸间滞涩之象，苦求市物却是买不起购不得，便也是得了这穷病了！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001179,"TalkGroupID":211001113,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"小友请留步！不知道友可有金灵果？白某不幸得了怪病，命不久矣，愿以5000灵石采买金灵果一枚，以作药引……还请小友务必出手救人！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001187,"TalkGroupID":211001120,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"DialogOptionID":[211001112,211001113],"TalkDescEditor":"既然如此，白某愿以5000灵石，换取阁下手中这枚金灵果，如何？如此价码，足见诚意了吧？","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001190,"TalkGroupID":211001121,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"原来如此！呵呵呵……嘶……看来小友于这灵果采买一事，的确是了若指掌，是白某唐突了。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001191,"TalkGroupID":211001121,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"DialogOptionID":[211001115,211001114],"TalkDescEditor":"（历经两次讨价还价，白蜀郎愿以筑基丹交换灵果，我应当如何作为？）","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001283,"TalkGroupID":211001121,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"（哎呀呀……从商数十年，今日碰上行家了。）","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001280,"TalkGroupID":211001121,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"白某手头有一枚筑基丹，也当得上与这灵果的价值，同是修行一路所需，也非灵石这身外之物，配这有价无市的灵果，够值当了！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001186,"TalkGroupID":211001120,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"唔，小友所言，的确在理……倒是白某诚意不足了。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001185,"TalkGroupID":211001120,"NpcIndex":-1,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"白道友，据我所知，灵果如今是有价无市……如今这价码的确诱人，却也并非旁人出不起的……","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001188,"TalkGroupID":211001121,"NpcIndex":-1,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"看来白道友误会在下的意思了。灵果既是有价无市，自然不应以灵石多少，加以衡量呀……","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001224,"TalkGroupID":211001127,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"痛快！小友果决过人，白某是打从心底敬佩哟！他日若有缘相逢，不妨在携手共图富贵，如何？哈哈哈哈哈！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001218,"TalkGroupID":211001123,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"事不过三……白某一片诚心，小友却如此漫天要价。既然这灵果千金不换，如此珍贵，小友还是自个儿留着吧，白某告辞了。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}
